expected_answer: A vector embedding is a numeric representation of text that captures semantic similarity.

messages.content: You are a helpful research assistant.
Vector embedding maps text to a numeric vector.

A vector embedding is a numeric representation of text that captures semantic similarity. It maps words or sentences into a high‑dimensional space where similar items are close together. This representation allows the model to retrieve and compare content efficiently.

final_answer: A vector embedding is a numeric representation of text that captures semantic similarity. It maps words or sentences into a high‑dimensional space where similar items are close together. This representation allows the model to retrieve and compare content efficiently.
